prompt:
(masterpiece, best quality, 8K, ultra-detailed), Japanese manga style, bold black ink outlines, screentone shading, high contrast, dramatic shadows, hand-drawn illustration aesthetic, full-body front-view portrait, pure white background, single character, young male protagonist with exceptionally refined and handsome features, mysterious aura.

--面部系统--
8K hyper-realistic anime facial modeling, sharp manga-style line art, perfectly sculpted jawline, piercing intelligent gaze with hint of otherworldly awareness, clean ink outlines around eyes and lips, crystalline iris highlights with subtle mirror-like reflection, slight bloodshot texture on sclera suggesting mental strain, matte translucent lip color, lip peak highlight strength 0.3, lip line depth 0.15.

--头发系统--
bold, defined hair strands with sharp ink outlines, distinct clumps of hair with screentone shading, intricate hair strands, root fixation coefficient 0.95, tip swing amplitude 10cm,
color layering: main color #1A1A2E, secondary color #16213E, highlight #0F3460, shadow #0E1B2E, 3-5 strands of gradient per cluster, natural color transition with subtle quantum shimmer effect,
physical wind simulation: point wind source behind neck (wind speed 1.2m/s, turbulence intensity 5%), wind direction 45°.

--衣物系统--
crisp modern casual clothing with sharp folds and ink outlines, subtle screentone on fabric, slight shoulder line folds (depth 0.3), fabric: matte texture, clean and sophisticated appearance suggesting high intelligence and refined taste.

--视角与构图--
perspective locked: full-body front view, eye-level, focal length 50mm, depth of field f/2.8, focal plane on character, pure white background only, no background elements,
action constraints: standing straight, arms relaxed at sides, completely static, no unnecessary movements., no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words, aspect ratio 1024:1536, portrait orientation

side.prompt:
Generate a full-body, side-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Facing left. Standing with arms relaxed at sides.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

back.prompt:
Generate a full-body, back-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. No facial features should be visible.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
